title: TSPP Bridge Golden Fixtures
description: Schema for the bridge_golden_fixtures.json file. Validates the structure of bridge semantic equivalence test cases used by test_07_bridge_equivalence.py.

system_of_record_truth.description: Optional ground-truth record from the system of record for documentation purposes.

trqp_query.description: Deprecated alias for query. Use query instead.

query.description: The TRQP authorization request body to issue.

expected.description: Key-value pairs that must be present and equal in the (unwrapped) TRQP authorization response payload.

expected_trqp_outcome.description: Deprecated flat expected outcome string. Use expected instead.
